---
title: "Top Signals"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _common import get_conn, resolve_quarter
conn = get_conn()
period = resolve_quarter(conn)  # THIRTEEN_F_QUARTER 환경변수 사용

conn.execute(
    """
    SELECT ticker, cusip, total_score, consensus_score, conviction_score,
           continuity_score, cloning_quality_score
    FROM total_scores
    WHERE period_of_report = ?
    ORDER BY total_score DESC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 50
    """,
    (period,),
).fetchdf()
```
